title: v3 Stress Test
body: Hello everyone, I'm excited to announce that v3 feature development is complete and we're starting pre-release stress testing before launch in late April. Please see this post for more details.

title: v3 Feedback II
body: Hello everyone, I'm excited to announce that the mobile development phase is now complete and a new feedback phase is starting. Please check out this post for more details. Any and all feedback is greatly appreciated!
